heading: Record of foreclosure and sale
label: 3764 Record of foreclosure and sale
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 815 of title VIII of S. 2281, One Hundred Third Congress, as reported , which was enacted into law by .July 13, 1994Pub. L. 103–327

children.text: the date, time, and place of the foreclosure sale;

that the mortgage was held by the Secretary, the date of the mortgage, the office in which the mortgage was recorded, and the liber number and folio or other appropriate description of the recordation of the mortgage;
the particulars of the foreclosure commissioner’s service of the notice of default and foreclosure sale in accordance with sections 3758 and 3760 of this title;
the date and place of filing the notice of default and foreclosure sale;
that the foreclosure was conducted in accordance with the provisions of this chapter and with the terms of the notice of default and foreclosure sale; and
be prima facie evidence of the truth of such facts in any Federal or State court; and
evidence a conclusive presumption in favor of bona fide purchasers and encumbrancers for value without notice.

children.heading: Recordation of instruments
children.label: c Recordation of instruments
children.text: The deed executed by the foreclosure commissioner, the foreclosure commissioner’s affidavit (if prepared) and any other instruments submitted for recordation in relation to the foreclosure of the security property under this chapter shall be accepted for recordation by the registrar of deeds or other appropriate official of the county or counties in which the security property is located upon tendering of payment of the usual recording fees for such instruments, and without regard to the compliance of those instruments with any other local filing requirements.
